zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat於1021年出生在法國奧維坎塔爾卡拉特時，她的父親Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat17歲，母親Nobilie Lodeve12歲。她於大約1050年與Berenger de Millau在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於從1060年到1071年在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat于1021年出生在法国奧維坎塔爾卡拉特时，她的父亲Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat17岁，母亲Nobilie Lodeve12岁。她于大约1050年与Berenger de Millau在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于从1060年到1071年在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Carlat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cairealláin (see Carolan 2).

variants.name: Carolan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Connolly, Malachy.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cearbhalláin, a northern and midland Irish name meaning ‘descendant of Cearbhallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Cearbhall (see Carroll ).

Anglicized form of Ó Cairealláin ‘descendant of Caireallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Caireall. In the 12th and 13th centuries this family were chieftains of Clondermot in Derry. Carleton was later adopted as an English equivalent.

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat was born in 1021, in Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, France, her father, Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat, was 17 and her mother, Nobilie Lodeve, was 12. She married Berenger de Millau about 1050, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died from 1060 to 1071, in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat est née en 1021, à Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, France, son père, Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Nobilie Lodeve, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Berenger de Millau environ 1050, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée du 1060 au 1071, à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat 1021 in Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat 17 und ihre Mutter Nobilie Lodeve 12. Sie hat um 1050 in Frankreich Berenger de Millau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb von 1060 bis 1071 in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat è nata il nel 1021 nel Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Nobilie Lodeve, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Berenger de Millau circa 1050, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì da 1060 a 1071, nel Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlatが1021年にフランスアウバーグンカンタルカーラトで生まれた時，父Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlatは17歳，母Nobilie Lodeveは12歳であった。約1050年にフランスでBerenger de Millauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女はから1060年まで1071年にフランスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat(이)가 1021년 프랑스 오버그니 캔탤 칼라트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nobilie Lodeve(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1050년 프랑스에서 Berenger de Millau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1060년 부터 1071년 까지 프랑스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat nasceu em 1021, em Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Nobilie Lodeve, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Berenger de Millau aproximadamente 1050, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu de 1060 a 1071, em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat родилась в 1021 г. в местности карлат, канталь, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Nobilie Lodeve, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Berenger de Millau около 1050 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла с 1060 по 1071 в местности Франция.

sm.from 1060 to 1071: mai le 1060 e o'o I le 1071

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Carlat Viscountess of Carlat nació en 1021, en Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Gilbert II Carlat Vicomte of Carlat, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Nobilie Lodeve, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Berenger de Millau aproximadamente 1050, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió desde 1060 hasta 1071, en Francia.
